benefits.description: NAD+ found to be very energy supportive with quasi mental stimulant effect somewhere between caffeine and Adderall without physical stimulation
NAD+ has a quasi mental stimulant effect

protocol_notes: Report uses 'SWIM' phrasing (Someone Who Isn't Me), suggesting indirect self-report. Notes anecdotal reports that BPC-157 can permanently inhibit effectiveness of ADHD stimulant medications even after cessation, and can interfere with SSRI efficacy and induce anhedonia. NAD+ considered worth discussing with a doctor but not an effective Adderall replacement.
